description: 透過 CF Tunnel + Docker 實現本地 N8N 部署至外網上

name: verbs
description: Public personal stack content (skills, agents, personal contexts) for pdctx framework. Renamed from pstack 2026-04-29.

name: murmur
description: Voice → text dictation for macOS+iOS. Personal dogfood + practice repo. Successor to panda850819/murmur-voice (Tauri/Rust). Hard kill 2026-08-11 if no iOS TestFlight.

name: notion-cli
description: CLI tool for managing Notion workspace - search, query databases, and manage tasks from your terminal

name: murmur-voice
description: Privacy-first voice-to-text for macOS and Windows. Local Whisper (Metal/CUDA) or Groq cloud, with LLM post-processing. Built with Rust + Tauri 2.

name: slack-cli
description: A CLI tool for searching and browsing Slack workspaces

name: telegram-cli
description: Headless Telegram CLI via tdlib - designed for AI agents and automation
